calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-06-450611 WITH CASE CPF-04-504711
Off Calendar Nov-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-06-450611 WITH CASE CPF-04-504711.
APPEARANCE: Colin R. Hatcher, Esq. of Law Offices of Cholakian & Associates 467-8200 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: Defendant presented a valid proof of service/declaration. Therefore, the Court granted the motion to consolidate #450611 with #504711 for all purposes. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (301/HEK/) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Hearing On Petitioner'S Petition For Leave To File Civil Action Against Public Entity
Off Calendar Feb-16-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Stephen M. Mackouse, Esq., (415) 552-0702, for Petitioner Leana Brown
Paul Brennan, Esq., Law Offices of Cholakian & Associates, (415) 467-8200, for Respondent and Opposing Party San Francisco Housing Authority
RULING:
A R G U E D: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER'S PETITION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CIVIL ACTION AGAINST PUBLIC ENTITY: GRANTED. Order signed. (301/JLW/ac) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION Ntc Of Mtn For Relief From Order
Off Calendar Jan-25-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul Brennan, Esq., Cholakian & Associates (415) 467-8200 for Defendant and Moving Party San Francisco Housing Authority
Stephen M. Mackouse, Esq. (415) 552-0702 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Brown
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION For Relief From Order of November 30, 2004 is GRANTED UPON PAYMENT OF ATTORNEYS' FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500.00. The Court's order of November 30, 2004 is vacated. The hearing on Plaintiff's Petition For Leave to File Civil Action Against Public Entity is scheduled for 02/16/05 in Dept. 301; Counsel shal provide courtesy copies to the Court as soon as possible. Order signed. (301/JLW/cl-x) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Petition For Leave To File Civil Action Against Public Entity (Govt C 946.6)

Stephen M. Mackouse, Law offices of Stephen M. Mackouse (415)552-0702 for Petitioner: Leana Brown

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER LEANA BROWN'S Petition For Leave To File Civil Action Against Public Entity (Govt C 946.6): GRANTED; no opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina T. Paxton, CSR #1558
